cleavage agent: the 15 ones presenting an abundance variation of 2-fold or greater, orange-marked spots in Fig. 5a, were excised from the gel, subjected to tryptic digestion...
fractionation method: Proteins were separated by SDS-PAGE and 2DE.
fragmentation method: Collision Induced Dissociation (CID) fragmentation in the LTQ...
instrument: Mass spectra were acquired on the LTQ-Orbitrap Velos (ThermoScientific)...
labeling: the comparison of yECM proteome from gup1∆ mutant and wt should therefore indicate candidate proteins involved in yECM physicochemical and molecular properties and functions...
